mapper.sql: id, name, paper_id, paper_name, course_id, course_name, teacher_id, teacher_name, start_time, end_time, duration, total_score, description, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from exam order by create_time desc
select e.* from exam e inner join course c on e.course_id = c.id where e.status in (0, 1) order by e.start_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into exam(name, paper_id, paper_name, course_id, course_name, teacher_id, teacher_name, start_time, end_time, duration, total_score, description, status) values(#{name}, #{paperId}, #{paperName}, #{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{teacherId}, #{teacherName}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{duration}, #{totalScore}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.delete:
delete from exam where id in
#{id}
